en: In his body and in mine, he's a well-respected man of our town, doing the best things so concerningly.
When I see them all running like that, with their things bouncing around in their shorts,
I always picture them naked, even if I don't want to. All I see is pork swords.
ko: 원치 않더라도 항상 그들이 나체인 모습이 떠올라.

en: I'm supposed to be running. So guess what?
What? I don't know. I'm pregnant.
